The hype was unprecedented. But hype obscures understanding. To truly grasp what's happening, we need perspective."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"h3","props":{"id":"a-brief-history-of-ai-panic"},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"A Brief History of \"AI Panic\""}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"This isn't the first time we've panicked about automation. Jobs shifted, not disappeared. New roles emerged. The economy adapted (unevenly, imperfectly, with casualties)."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"h2","props":{"id":"what-chatgpt-actually-is"},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"What ChatGPT Actually Is"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"ChatGPT is a language model—a statistical pattern-matching system trained on internet text. It predicts the next word better than previous systems. That's technically impressive. But it's not AGI (Artificial General Intelligence), and it's not conscious."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"What it "},{"type":"element","tag":"em","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"is"}]},{"type":"text","value":":"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"ul","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Exceptionally But:"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"ul","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"New jobs emerged (printers, editors, publishers)"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Information accessibility exploded"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Knowledge democratized"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Literacy became necessary (creating demand for education)"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Society transformed"}]}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"The transition took "},{"type":"element","tag":"em","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"decades"}]},{"type":"text","value":" and caused real suffering for many scribes."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"h2","props":{"id":"what-happens-next"},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"What Happens Next"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"If history guides us:"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"ul","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Some jobs will vanish; others will emerge"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"The transition will be choppy and unequal"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Policy choices matter enormously (did we have good safety nets in 1450? It's about "},{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"how society distributes the gains from innovation"}]},{"type":"text","value":"."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"The AI is just a catalyst revealing our choices: Do we value workers?
